clink_morphisms: spontaneous quantum fluctuations manifest virtual particles from the void, establishing dynamic field excitations
gauge interactions and symmetry breaking bind field excitations into stable particles with conserved quantum numbers
electromagnetic forces couple nuclei and electrons to form stable atomic structures with emergent chemical properties
covalent bonding and self-assembly organize atoms into functional biomolecules (proteins, nucleic acids) capable of information processing
membrane encapsulation and metabolic integration of biomolecules yield electrically excitable neuronal cells with signal-transduction capabilities
synaptic connectivity and network plasticity across neuronal cells generate integrated information flows that instantiate conscious experience

levels.tanch: Crystal boundary sealing all valid joint assignments
cell membrane boundary that contains and protects biomolecule
the stable ego-boundary that contains conscious experience
